spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Dark themes need negative space to avoid feeling cluttered. Mobile-first focus.

surface_strategies.cards: background_surface (#171717) with 1px solid border (#3f3f46). Subtle inner shadow. No blur.
surface_strategies.header: Solid #0a0a0a or #000000 with border-b (#3f3f46). Needs to be fixed z-50.

components.hero_slider: Full width, max height 80vh. Overlay bg-black/60 so search text is legible. Slider contains background image.
components.search_engine: Bento style. 3 select dropdowns (Marka, Model, Yil) + 1 Search Button. Should be an elevated card overlapping the hero section or directly inside it.
components.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-orange-500 text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-orange-600. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-neutral-700 hover:border-neutral-500 text-white.
components.product_card: Vertical layout. Image container max-h-48. Title truncate 2 lines. Price in primary color. Add to Cart button full width at bottom.
components.inputs: bg-neutral-900 border-neutral-700 text-white focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-orange-500 rounded-md.

motion.page_load: framer-motion staggered fade-in for lists and grids

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building an e-commerce platform for motorcycle parts named MotoProf.
The application must be heavily themed as a dark 'industrial/garage' app targeting mechanics and motorcycle owners.
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) with a 'duotone' or 'bold' weight to match the mechanical feel.
Ensure all HTML elements mapped to interactive events include a data-testid attribute.
The search engine (Marka/Model/Yil) is the core feature and must be placed prominently on the homepage, likely overlaid on the hero slider.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactive pieces (like the dropdowns for the search engine) but stylize them heavily using Tailwind to match the dark theme.
Import Google Fonts 'Chivo' and 'IBM Plex Sans' in your index.css or via layout.
Use the provided image URLs as actual placeholders for your UI.
Language must be Turkish (e.g., 'Sepete Ekle' instead of 'Add to Cart', 'Giriş Yap' instead of 'Login').
